| VM-ENDPOINT-RESPONSE-SOURCE-019 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/island.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/island_msg.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_shared.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_thread.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/types.rs` | `vm_endpoint_closed_response_owner_019_rejects_non_home_source`, `vm_endpoint_response_source_019_same_island_request_replays_response_through_endpoint_boundary`, `vm_endpoint_response_source_019_same_island_closed_endpoint_receiver_replays_through_endpoint_response_boundary`, `vm_endpoint_response_source_019_same_island_closed_endpoint_sender_replays_through_endpoint_response_boundary`, `island_command_codec_roundtrips_all_variants`. | Failing-first proof showed a forged `EndpointResponseKind::Closed` could poison a remote proxy because endpoint responses carried no source island; the follow-up proof showed same-island endpoint responses must still replay through the endpoint boundary after source validation. The fix adds `from_island` to `IslandCommand::EndpointResponse`, propagates it through runtime-boundary effects and island message encoding, and accepts remote-proxy responses only from the proxy home island while accepting local live/tombstone responses from the current island. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-endpoint-response-source-019 cargo test -p vo-vm vm_endpoint_response_source_019 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`, the focused VM/JIT 019 gates, and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-019-runtime cargo test -p vo-runtime island_msg -- --test-threads=1`; selected by VM hardening and runtime protocol gates. |
| VM-SELECT-WOKEN-PAYLOAD-LAYOUT-019 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/exec/queue.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/exec/select.rs` | `vm_select_woken_payload_contract_019_rejects_slot_kind_drift_before_storage`. | Failing-first proof forged a same-width select recv wake payload with `Value` metadata for a `String` channel, making a root-bearing payload invisible to precise GC before `SelectExec`. The fix derives the expected queue element slot layout at the runtime wake boundary and revalidates exact slot kinds during woken recv completion. Passed the focused VM and VM JIT 019 gates; selected by VM hardening filters. |
| VM-IFACE-WRAPPER-DYNAMIC-CALL-WIDTH-019 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, `tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_interface_method_value_slot_count_limit.vo`, `tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_embedded_iface_method_expr_slot_count_limit.vo` | `2026-02-18-interface-method-value-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-embedded-iface-method-expr-slot-count-limit`. | Failing-first compile proofs panicked in the old `encode_call_args` path for synthetic interface method-value and embedded-interface method-expression wrappers. The fix removes that wrapper-only dynamic-call encoder, routes wrapper `CallIface` shapes through the checked dynamic-call contract, and records builder layout errors through `CodegenContext`. The two compile-fail cases now pass with the expected `dynamic call slot count exceeds u8` diagnostic and are tagged `vm-contract` in the manifest; the compile cases are selected by `vo-test-compile` through `compile-contract` in `contract` and through `lang-main` in `vm-production`, while codegen wrapper proofs are selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-CALLIFACE-METHOD-INDEX-019 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/call.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, `tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_call_iface_method_index_u8_limit.vo` | `2026-02-18-call-iface-method-index-u8-limit`, `defer_iface_wrapper_records_method_index_truncation`. | Failing-first compile proof panicked while lowering interface method index 256 into the `CallIface` u8 flag. The fix makes `CodegenContext::call_iface_method_index_or_record` the single narrowing owner, changes `emit_call_iface` to accept an already checked `u8`, and routes direct calls, method values, embedded method expressions, and defer wrappers through that owner. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-calliface-index-019 ./d.py test compile tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_call_iface_method_index_u8_limit.vo` and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-019-codegen-method-index-2 cargo test -p vo-codegen defer_iface_wrapper_records_method_index_truncation -- --test-threads=1`; the compile case is selected by `vo-test-compile` through `compile-contract` in `contract` and through `lang-main` in `vm-production`, while the wrapper unit is selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-DOCS-SIGNOFF-STARTUP-ROW-019 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-readiness.md` | `selfTestVmProductionReadinessSignoffLint`. | Red-team docs audit found the signoff lint rejected duplicate current startup-hang rows but allowed the row to be missing, which could let a restored-signoff claim bypass the open-row check. The fix requires exactly one current `VM-TEST-BINARY-STARTUP-HANG-002` row before `### Superseded` and adds a missing-row self-test; `docs-lint` remains selected by `docs-contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-DIRECT-METHOD-CAPTURE-SEMANTIC-019 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/island_msg.rs` | `vm_direct_method_capture_protocol_006_unpack_preserves_raw_receiver_slots`. | The runtime island message gate exposed a test-contract error: the direct-method raw receiver capture proof compared source and destination `GcRef` addresses even though the cross-island protocol deliberately pack/unpacks by transfer metadata. The proof now verifies raw slot shape plus destination `String` kind/content instead of source pointer identity; `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-019-runtime cargo test -p vo-runtime island_msg -- --test-threads=1` passes and is selected by `cargo-test-runtime` through `runtime-contract`, `contract`, and `vm-production`. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-TOMBSTONE-AUTHORITY-020 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/types.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_shared.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs` | `vm_endpoint_response_source_020_closed_tombstone_preserves_home_send_ack_authority`, `vm_endpoint_response_source_020_closed_tombstone_preserves_home_recv_data_authority`. | Red-team proof showed a legitimate `Closed` from an endpoint home island could replace a remote proxy with an anonymous tombstone, causing a later targeted `SendAck`/`RecvData` from the same home island to be rejected and leaving the source wait orphaned. Tombstones now preserve the response-source island when they are created from endpoint responses or boundary close replay, and response authorization treats that source as the owner of subsequent pending responses. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-020 cargo test -p vo-vm 020 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture` and the `--features jit` twin; selected by VM hardening gates through `vm_` proof names. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-REMOTE-CLOSE-TOMBSTONE-SOURCE-021 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_shared.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/jit/callbacks/queue.rs` | `vm_endpoint_tombstone_authority_021_remote_close_transition_preserves_home_send_ack_authority`, `vm_jit_queue_close_osr_001_local_endpoint_close_publishes_pending_transition_under_lease`. | Red-team proof showed remote-close transitions could create tombstones owned by the local proxy island instead of the endpoint home island, rejecting the legitimate home `SendAck`/`RecvData` that settles an already pending wait. `RuntimeTransition` now carries `EndpointTombstone { endpoint_id, response_source }`, and interpreter/JIT close producers preserve the endpoint home island as the response source. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-021 cargo test -p vo-vm vm_endpoint_tombstone_authority_021 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture` and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-jit-021 cargo test -p vo-vm --features jit vm_jit_queue_close_osr_001 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by VM hardening gates through `vm_` proof names. |
| VM-DYNAMIC-CALL-AGGREGATE-WIDTH-020 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/call.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/defer_go.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, `tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_dynamic_call_aggregate_slot_count_limit.vo` | `2026-02-18-dynamic-call-aggregate-slot-count-u16-limit`, `iface_wrapper_records_aggregate_param_slot_width`. | Red-team audit found dynamic call and wrapper aggregate slot counts could be summed or defined through local `u16` casts before reaching the checked ABI owner. `calc_method_arg_slots*`, interface method-slot queries, wrapper param definition, and defer/go scheduled argument counts now keep aggregate widths as `usize` until `CodegenContext` records the single layout contract error. | VM-CALLEXTERN-GOISLAND-ARG-WIDTH-021 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/builtin.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/defer_go.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, `tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_call_extern_arg_slot_count_u8_limit.vo`, `tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_go_island_arg_slot_count_u8_limit.vo` | `call_extern_records_u8_arg_width_overflow`, `go_island_records_u8_arg_width_overflow`, `2026-02-18-call-extern-arg-slot-count-u8-limit`, `2026-02-18-go-island-arg-slot-count-u8-limit`. | Red-team audit found `CallExtern` and `GoIsland` producers still narrowed argument slot counts through panic-only u8 packing. `FuncBuilder` now owns the checked u8 argument-count diagnostic for both opcodes, and manifest compile-fail cases prove builtin extern and island-go sources fail before bytecode emission. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-021 cargo test -p vo-codegen records_u8_arg_width -- --test-threads=1` and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-compile-021 ./d.py test compile tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_go_island_arg_slot_count_u8_limit.vo tests/lang/cases/typechecker/2026_02_18_call_extern_arg_slot_count_u8_limit.vo`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen`, and selected by `vo-test-compile` through `compile-contract` in `contract` and through `lang-main` in `vm-production`. |
| VM-DEFER-EXTERN-WRAPPER-ARITY-021 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs` | `defer_extern_wrapper_cache_key_includes_arg_count`, `defer_extern_wrapper_records_call_extern_arg_width`. | Red-team audit found scheduled extern wrappers cached only by extern name and return layout, so later defer/go extern calls with different arity could reuse the wrong wrapper signature and bypass the real `CallExtern` argument shape. The wrapper cache key now includes arity, and the wrapper builder records `CallExtern` width diagnostics through `CodegenContext`. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-wrapper-021 cargo test -p vo-codegen defer_extern_wrapper -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-RETURNSHAPE-SLOT-WIDTH-021 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/bytecode.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs` | `return_shape_rejects_slot_type_width_overflow`. | Red-team audit found `ReturnShape::with_slot_types` still narrowed slot-vector length to `u16` with a cast, creating a silent truncation path for declared extern return layouts. `ReturnShape::try_with_slot_types` is now the non-lossy construction owner, with codegen recording the diagnostic into the existing layout-error channel. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-common-core-021 cargo test -p vo-common-core return_shape_rejects_slot_type_width_overflow -- --test-threads=1`; selected by common-core contract gates. |
| VM-WRAPPER-BUILDER-LAYOUT-ERROR-022 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs` | `add_function_from_builder_records_layout_errors`, `wrapper_builders_use_context_registration_owner`. | Red-team audit found value-receiver interface wrappers, promoted method-expression wrappers, and promoted interface wrappers could build a `FuncBuilder` and call `ctx.add_function` directly, bypassing builder layout-error recording. `CodegenContext::add_function_from_builder` is now the single generated-builder registration owner, and wrapper producers route through it. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-022 cargo test -p vo-codegen add_function_from_builder -- --test-threads=1`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-022 cargo test -p vo-codegen wrapper_builders_use_context_registration_owner -- --test-threads=1`, and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-022 cargo test -p vo-codegen wrapper::tests -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-CALLEXTERN-EXTERN-ID-WIDTH-022 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs` | `call_extern_records_extern_id_width_overflow`. | Red-team audit found `CallExtern` extern ids above the u16 bytecode operand range still used panic-only narrowing, while final id-limit checks cover 24-bit metadata categories rather than this opcode operand. `FuncBuilder::emit_call_extern` now records the extern-id u16 operand contract through the same layout-error channel as argument width. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-022 cargo test -p vo-codegen call_extern_records -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-COMMAND-QUEUE-TEST-CONTRACT-022 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs` | `command_queue_endpoint_response_wakes_blocked_fiber`. | Red-team audit found this unit proof queued an endpoint response from island `9` without first registering live/tombstone endpoint authority, so it no longer modeled the current response-source contract. The test now installs a tombstone response source before exercising command-queue response delivery, keeping the proof focused on command queue wake behavior without weakening production authorization. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-test-contract-022 cargo test -p vo-vm command_queue_endpoint_response_wakes_blocked_fiber -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by full `cargo-test-vm` gates. |
| VM-CODEGEN-GLOBAL-SLOT-WIDTH-023 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, global get/set lowering paths | `vm_codegen_global_slot_width_023_rejects_unencodable_total_width`. | Red-team audit found package global slot offsets accumulated as `u32` but were narrowed with local `as u16` casts at read/write sites, allowing slot `65536` to alias slot `0` in accepted bytecode. `CodegenContext::register_global` now owns the VM-encodable global slot domain, records an error once total global slots exceed the u16 operand address space, stores only `u16` offsets downstream, and `FuncBuilder` records `GlobalGetN`/`GlobalSetN` packed-width errors instead of panicking. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-023b cargo test -p vo-codegen 023 -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-GENERATED-ENTRY-BUILDER-LAYOUT-023 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/lib.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs` | `vm_codegen_generated_entry_builder_layout_023_uses_context_registration_owner`. | Red-team audit found generated `__init__`, `__island_init__`, and `__entry__` builders could call `builder.build()` plus `ctx.add_function` directly, bypassing context-owned layout-error recording. These generated functions now register through `CodegenContext::add_function_from_builder`, and `compile_project` checks the layout-error ledger immediately after entry generation. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-023b cargo test -p vo-codegen 023 -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-DEFER-EXTERN-WRAPPER-PARAM-WIDTH-023 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs` | `vm_defer_extern_wrapper_param_width_023_records_layout_error`. | Red-team audit found deferred extern wrappers still defined forwarded interface parameters through a panic-only path when aggregate parameter slots exceeded u16. `generate_defer_extern_wrapper` now records parameter-definition overflow into the existing layout-error channel and stops before emitting a `CallExtern` over an invalid parameter range. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-023b cargo test -p vo-codegen wrapper::tests -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-DYN-ACCESS-LAYOUT-WIDTH-023 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/dyn_access.rs` | `vm_dyn_access_layout_width_023_uses_checked_layout_owners`. | Red-team audit found dynamic `~>` call/method lowering still used unchecked `u16` counts and offset arithmetic for argument packing, expected return metadata, and result copying. Dynamic access lowering now computes counts and offsets through checked helpers that record layout errors through `CodegenContext`, while `FuncBuilder::emit_call_extern` remains the single packed-arg/extern-id bytecode owner. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-023b cargo test -p vo-codegen 023 -- --test-threads=1`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-ISLAND-WAKE-SEPARATION-023 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs` | `vm_endpoint_island_wake_023_rejects_simple_waiter_for_endpoint_wait`, `vm_endpoint_island_wake_023_rejects_endpoint_waiter_without_response`. | Red-team audit found `IslandCommand::WakeFiber` could present a simple or endpoint-shaped queue waiter for a fiber whose real obligation was an endpoint response, waking it through `scheduler.wake_queue_waiter` without endpoint id, wait id, response kind, source, or `pending_island_responses` validation. The IslandWake boundary now rejects endpoint waiters and any target fiber with a live `remote_endpoint_wait`; endpoint waits can resume only through `RuntimeCommand::endpoint_response`. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-023b cargo test -p vo-vm vm_endpoint_island_wake_023 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by VM hardening gates through `vm_` proof names. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-RUNTIME-WAKE-SEPARATION-024 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/types.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs` | `vm_endpoint_runtime_wake_024_rejects_simple_waiter_for_endpoint_wait`, `vm_endpoint_runtime_wake_024_rejects_endpoint_waiter_without_response`. | Red-team audit found ordinary `RuntimeTransition` queue wakes could still present simple or endpoint waiters for a fiber whose live obligation was an endpoint response, bypassing the 023 `IslandWake` guard. `VmState::wake_waiter` is now the ordinary queue-wake owner and rejects endpoint-shaped waiters plus local targets with a live `remote_endpoint_wait`, preserving `pending_island_responses` until `RuntimeCommand::endpoint_response` validates endpoint id/source/kind. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-024 cargo test -p vo-vm 024 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by VM hardening gates through `vm_` proof names. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-RESPONSE-SOURCE-MISSING-REGISTRY-024 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_shared.rs` | `vm_endpoint_response_source_024_missing_registry_rejects_targeted_response`. | Red-team audit found missing endpoint registry entries were authorized as current-island responses, letting a forged targeted response satisfy a pending wait without a live proxy owner or tombstone response source. `endpoint_response_from_authorized_source` now treats a missing registry entry as ownerless and rejects the response before pending accounting changes. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-024 cargo test -p vo-vm 024 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by VM hardening gates through the `vm_` proof name. |
| VM-GC-JIT-FRAMECHANGED-DIRTY-024 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs` | `vm_gc_jit_frame_changed_024_refetch_dirties_current_fiber_roots`. | Red-team audit found JIT-internal `FrameChanged` could be consumed by `run_fiber` and hidden from the scheduling boundary; a later `GcRootEffect::None` transition could then allow GC to observe stale dirty-root state. `run_fiber` now uses a single `refetch_after_frame_change!` owner that marks current-fiber roots dirty before refetching any consumed frame change. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-vm-024 cargo test -p vo-vm 024 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by VM/GC hardening gates through the `vm_` proof name. |
| VM-QUEUE-ABI-WIDTH-024 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, queue make/send/select-send lowering paths | `vm_queue_make_abi_width_024_uses_result_owners`, `vm_queue_send_abi_width_024_consumes_prepacked_flags`, `vm_select_send_abi_width_024_consumes_prepacked_flags`. | Red-team audit found QueueNew, QueueSend, and SelectSend still used panic-only u8 packed-width helpers even though receive-side layout errors were structured. QueueNew and QueueSend ABI helpers now return `Result` to the compile path, and QueueSend/SelectSend emitters consume prepacked flags rather than owning width checks locally. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-024 cargo test -p vo-codegen 024 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture`; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` through `codegen-contract`. |
| VM-DOCS-SIGNOFF-FINAL-GATE-GUARD-024 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-readiness.md` | `selfTestVmProductionReadinessSignoffLint`, `lint_selected_gate_tasks_have_timeouts_rejects_non_test_task_without_timeout`. | Red-team audit found docs-lint would allow the current startup blocker row to be changed to `Closed` before final `contract` and `vm-production` evidence existed, and found stale references to the old timeout proof name. Docs-lint now requires a dedicated final signoff gate-evidence section before the startup blocker can close, and readiness references the current `lint_selected_gate_tasks_have_timeouts` contract. Passed `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`; `docs-lint` is selected by `docs-contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-QUEUE-SEND-ABI-OWNER-025 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/select.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, queue send/select-send ABI compile cases | `vm_queue_send_abi_owner_025_emitters_receive_prepacked_flags`, `2026-02-18-queue-send-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-select-send-abi-slot-count-limit`. | Red-team audit found the 024 fix still had two packed-width owners: statement lowering asked `TypeInfoWrapper` for QueueSend width, then `FuncBuilder` recomputed QueueSend/SelectSend flags from layout length. `TypeInfoWrapper::queue_send_flags` is now the single packed-flag owner, and both send lowerers pass the encoded flag into emitters that only attach metadata. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-025-proof cargo test -p vo-codegen 025 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture` and the focused language compile-fail run for all new queue/map ABI cases; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` and by `vo-test-compile` through compile contracts in `contract` / `vm-production`. |
| VM-MAPNEW-ABI-WIDTH-025 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/builtin.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/literal.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, map make/literal ABI compile cases | `vm_map_new_abi_width_025_rejects_key_truncation_without_panic`, `vm_map_new_abi_width_025_rejects_value_truncation_without_panic`, `2026-02-18-map-make-key-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-make-value-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-literal-key-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-literal-value-abi-slot-count-limit`. | Red-team audit found the same packed-width panic class still existed in MapNew: both `make(map[K]V)` and map literals called a panic-only `encode_map_new_slots`. `try_encode_map_new_slots` now returns the structured diagnostic, and both map construction paths propagate it through `CodegenError::Internal` before bytecode emission. Passed `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/private/tmp/volang-codegen-025-proof cargo test -p vo-codegen 025 -- --test-threads=1 --nocapture` and the focused language compile-fail run for all new queue/map ABI cases; selected by `cargo-test-codegen` and compile-language gates. |
| VM-MAP-ACCESS-ABI-WIDTH-026 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/instruction.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/lvalue.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/indexing.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/literal.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, map get/set ABI compile cases | `packed_operand_helpers_reject_truncating_slot_counts`, `vm_map_access_abi_width_026_rejects_map_set_key_truncation_without_panic`, `vm_map_access_abi_width_026_rejects_map_set_value_truncation_without_panic`, `vm_map_access_abi_width_026_rejects_map_get_value_truncation_without_panic`, `2026-02-18-map-set-key-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-set-value-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-get-value-abi-slot-count-limit`. | Follow-up validation found the 025 packed-width cleanup still left MapSet/MapGet access paths with missing Result helpers or infallible lvalue emission. Common-core now owns the MapSet/MapGet packed helpers, `try_encode_map_set_meta` and `try_encode_map_get_meta` expose structured diagnostics, lvalue load/store propagate `CodegenError::Internal`, and map get/set/literal/index paths use the Result helpers before bytecode emission. Passed focused common-core/codegen proofs, the map access compile-fail cases, and full `vo-common-core`/`vo-codegen` crate tests; selected by `cargo-test-codegen`, common-core tests, and compile-language gates. |
| VM-JIT-QUEUE-SEND-PACKED-FLAGS-026 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/types.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/requirements.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/rows.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/fields.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/opcode.rs` | `queue_send_flags_are_declared_by_queue_and_select_semantic_rows_026`, `packed_operand_contracts_cover_semantic_matrix_and_have_widths`. | Red-team audit found QueueSend and SelectSend lowering read `inst.flags` as element-slot width while their semantic rows declared `NO_PACKED`, leaving the JIT fact source without a packed operand contract. `PackedOperand::QueueSendFlags` now owns the shared 8-bit flags contract, both semantic rows reference it, and the contract graph declares the width from `QUEUE_SEND_MAX_ELEM_SLOTS`. Passed focused and full `vo-jit` tests; selected by `cargo-test-jit` and JIT contract gates. |
| VM-MAPITER-ABI-COVERAGE-026 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/for_range.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, map range ABI compile cases | `2026-02-18-map-iter-key-abi-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-iter-value-abi-slot-count-limit`. | Red-team audit found MapIterNext had a source fail-fast for its 4-bit key/value flags but no manifest-level behavior proof. Map range lowering now derives the encoded slot counts from the same key/value slot layouts it records as JIT metadata, then checks the packed flags before bytecode emission. Passed the focused language compile-fail run for both key and value overflow cases; selected by `vo-test-compile` through compile contracts. |
| VM-MAPNEW-U16-META-WIDTH-027 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/builtin.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/literal.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_info.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, map make u16 compile cases | `2026-02-18-map-make-key-u16-slot-count-limit`, `2026-02-18-map-make-value-u16-slot-count-limit`. | Red-team follow-up found `get_or_create_map_metas` still used the panic-only map key/value slot helper before MapNew packing, so `make(map[[65536]int]int)` and `make(map[int][65536]int)` could abort the compiler before structured diagnostics. Map metadata creation now derives key/value counts through `try_type_slot_count`, and make/map-literal producers propagate the existing `CodegenError::Internal` contract. The focused compile-fail proof passed and is selected by `vo-test-compile` through `contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-JIT-CALL-FLAGS-PACKED-ROWS-027 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/types.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/requirements.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/rows.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/fields.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/opcode.rs` | `call_boundary_flags_are_declared_by_semantic_rows_027`, `go_island_arg_flags_are_not_shared_call_shape_027`, `packed_operand_contracts_cover_semantic_matrix_and_have_widths`. | Red-team audit found CallExtern, CallIface, and GoIsland lowering read `inst.flags` fields that were either absent from the semantic row or incorrectly modeled as `SharedCallShape`. Dedicated packed operands now own `flags.arg_slots`, `flags.method_index`, and GoIsland `flags.arg_slots`, and GoIsland no longer advertises the shared-call encoding it does not use. Focused JIT semantic proofs and the packed-operand contract graph proof passed; selected by `cargo-test-jit` and JIT contract gates. |
| VM-MAP-ACCESS-METADATA-VERIFY-WIDTH-027 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/errors.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/tests/collections.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_map_set_key_metadata_beyond_runtime_meta_width_027`, `module_verifier_rejects_map_set_value_metadata_beyond_runtime_meta_width_027`, `module_verifier_rejects_map_get_value_metadata_beyond_runtime_meta_width_027`, `rejects_map_get_output_range_overflow`. | Red-team audit found malformed bytecode could present MapSet/MapGet JIT metadata layouts wider than the runtime packed metadata fields even after codegen stopped emitting those widths. The shared module verifier now rejects metadata layouts above the same MapSet u8 and MapGet 15-bit limits before storage layout checks, keeping malformed modules outside both interpreter and JIT execution; JIT error normalization also treats the common verifier's `MapGet value` range as a write target so strict and shared verifier diagnostics agree. Focused common-core verifier proof and the JIT MapGet output-overflow proof passed and are selected by common-core/JIT contract gates. |
| VM-STACK-ARRAY-SLOTN-ABI-WIDTH-028 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, stack-array compile cases | `2026-02-18-stack-array-get-element-slot-count-u8-limit`, `2026-02-18-stack-array-set-element-slot-count-u8-limit`. | Red-team follow-up found stack-array `SlotGetN` and `SlotSetN` still used a panic-only `u8` element-slot helper, so `[2][256]int` element load/store could abort codegen before diagnostics. The emitters now use the existing layout-error channel through `checked_u8_slot_count_or_record`, preserving the packed operand as the single failure point and producing structured compile-fail output. The focused language proof passed and is selected by `vo-test-compile` through `contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-JIT-MISC-FLAGS-PACKED-ROWS-028 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/instruction.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/types.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/requirements.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/semantics/rows.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/fields.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/opcode.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/tests/scalar.rs` | `vm_jit_packed_flag_semantic_rows_028_cover_flags_consumers`, `module_verifier_rejects_trunc_zero_width_flags_028`, `module_verifier_rejects_trunc_unsupported_width_flags_028`, `packed_operand_helpers_reject_truncating_slot_counts`, `packed_operand_contracts_cover_semantic_matrix_and_have_widths`. | Red-team audit found ForLoop, Hint, IfaceAssert, Trunc, and Return had packed operands read by VM/JIT code without matching semantic-row and contract-graph ownership, and Trunc/IfaceAssert still accepted domains wider than runtime support. Dedicated packed operands now own each shape, Hint uses a loop-shape metadata owner instead of reusing `ForLoopTarget`, IfaceAssert packing rejects unsupported assert kinds, and the shared module verifier rejects unsupported Trunc widths before interpreter or JIT execution. Focused common-core and JIT proofs passed; selected by common-core/JIT contract gates. |
| VM-ELEM-BYTES-WIDTH-028 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/lvalue.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/var_def.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/tests/integration.rs` | `slice_index_preserves_large_element_byte_width_028`, `escaped_array_index_preserves_large_element_byte_width_028`. | Red-team audit found slice and heap-array element metadata kept `elem_bytes` in a `u16`, so a legal element such as `[8192]int` preserved its 8192 slots but narrowed 65536 bytes to 0 in `ElemLayout`. Codegen storage and container facts now carry `elem_bytes` as `usize`, and the metadata source preserves both byte width and slot layout for slice and escaped-array get/set. Focused and full `vo-codegen` tests passed; selected by `cargo-test-codegen`. |
| VM-ENDPOINT-SAME-ISLAND-BLOCK-ORDER-028 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs` | `vm_endpoint_same_island_recv_request_blocks_before_dispatch_028`. | Red-team audit found same-island endpoint requests could be dispatched synchronously before the current fiber entered its `Blocked(Queue)` state, causing the immediate endpoint response to be rejected while the pending-island counter stayed nonzero. Runtime-boundary transitions now apply the block boundary before island-command dispatch, so same-island responses can satisfy the wait and clear pending ownership in the same turn. Focused runtime-boundary tests passed with and without the `jit` feature; selected by VM hardening tests through the `vm_` proof name. |
| VM-DYNAMIC-ELEM-BYTES-META-DRIFT-029 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/tests/metadata.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/tests/collections.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_dynamic_elem_bytes_metadata_drift_029`. | Red-team audit found dynamic array/slice element-byte operands were still a split fact: the interpreter consumed the register while JIT lowering consumed `JitInstructionMetadata::ElemLayout`. The shared verifier now requires a preceding constant writer for the dynamic elem-bytes ABI slot and rejects drift against the metadata layout before interpreter or JIT execution. JIT verifier fixtures now model the same ABI fact instead of relying on missing-register behavior. Focused common-core proof and full `vo-common-core` / `vo-jit` tests passed; selected by common-core/JIT contract gates. |
| VM-MAP-ACCESS-PACKED-META-DRIFT-029 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/tests/collections.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/verifier/tests/metadata.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_map_get_packed_meta_metadata_drift_029`, `module_verifier_rejects_map_set_packed_meta_metadata_drift_029`, `module_verifier_rejects_map_delete_packed_meta_metadata_drift_029`. | Red-team audit found MapGet/MapSet could encode packed key/value/ok facts in a register that disagreed with JIT metadata, and the same fact-source split existed for MapDelete key width. The shared verifier now treats the packed metadata register and JIT metadata as one contract, rejecting unsupported high bits and layout drift before slot-layout checks. Focused common-core proof and full `vo-common-core` / `vo-jit` tests passed; selected by common-core/JIT contract gates. |
| VM-SPARSE-SLICE-LITERAL-INDEX-029 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/literal.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml`, `tests/lang/cases/runtime/slice/2026_02_18_sparse_slice_literal_keyed_index.vo` | `2026-02-18-sparse-slice-literal-keyed-index`. | Red-team audit found keyed slice literals used the number of literal elements as the runtime slice length and narrowed keyed indices through `u16`, so `[]int{70000: 7}` allocated length 1 and wrote index 4464. Slice literal lowering now resolves keyed indices once, sizes the slice from the maximum keyed index plus one, and emits large lengths/indices through constants instead of packed u16 operands. The VM/JIT language proof passes and is selected as both VM and JIT jobs by the language test plan. |
| VM-HINT-DOMAIN-029 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_unknown_hint_kind_029`, `module_verifier_rejects_hint_loop_exit_pc_out_of_range_029`. | Red-team audit found unknown `Hint` kinds executed as implicit no-ops and `HINT_LOOP` accepted an out-of-range `exit_pc`, leaving loop-analysis and verifier facts with a wider domain than the bytecode contract. The shared verifier now accepts only `HINT_NOP` and `HINT_LOOP`, rejects unsupported loop flags, and validates any nonzero loop exit target against the function code length. Focused common-core proof and full `vo-common-core` / `vo-jit` tests passed; selected by common-core/JIT contract gates. |
| VM-JIT-PACKED-FIELD-DOMAINS-029 | Closed, 2026-06-18; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/types.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/fields.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/contract_graph/tests.rs` | `packed_operand_contracts_describe_reserved_domains_029`. | Red-team audit found the JIT contract graph recorded field widths but not reserved/non-contiguous domains, so Trunc byte widths, Hint loop flags, and Return masks could look fully covered while the runtime accepted only smaller domains. `FieldWidth` now carries a `FieldDomain`, with allowed-value or allowed-mask domains for those packed fields, and contract tests require reserved domains to be described. Focused and full `vo-jit` tests passed; selected by the JIT contract gate. |
| VM-CONSTANT-FACT-DOMINANCE-030 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_non_dominating_dynamic_elem_bytes_constant_030`, `module_verifier_rejects_merged_map_get_packed_meta_constant_drift_030`. | Red-team audit found the 029 verifier proof used textual backward scans, so malformed bytecode could jump around a matching `LoadConst` or merge conflicting constants before dynamic elem-bytes and MapGet metadata uses. The shared verifier now builds a function-level CFG must-constant fact for only the ABI constant slots that dynamic element layouts and map metadata consume; joins preserve a value only when every path agrees, and writes to tracked slots kill stale facts. Focused common-core proofs plus full `vo-common-core`, `vo-jit`, and `vo-codegen` tests passed; selected by common-core/JIT/codegen contract gates. |
| VM-MAPNEW-RUNTIME-META-LAYOUT-031 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/bytecode.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_map_new_runtime_meta_layout_drift_031`. | Red-team audit found `MapNew` verified only encoded key/value slot counts against JIT metadata while the VM stored unchecked runtime `ValueMeta` and key RTTID from stack slots into the map object. A hand-authored module could create a map whose GC scan metadata said scalar values while `MapSet`/JIT metadata proved `GcRef` values. The shared verifier now proves `MapNew` packed metadata and key RTTID as dominating constants, derives runtime slot layouts from the canonical bytecode value-kind layout owner, and rejects drift against `JitInstructionMetadata::MapNew`. Focused common-core proof passed; selected by common-core contract gates. |
| VM-CONSTANT-FACT-MULTISLOT-WRITE-031 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_ptr_get_n_killed_map_get_metadata_fact_031`. | Red-team audit found the 030 must-constant analysis treated `PtrGetN` as a single-slot write, so a multi-slot heap read could overwrite a tracked MapGet metadata slot at runtime while the verifier preserved a stale constant fact. The write model now kills every `PtrGetN` destination slot, and the tracked-slot dependency closure covers the `Shl`/`Or` producer pattern used for `MapNew` packed metadata. Focused common-core proof passed; selected by common-core contract gates. |
| VM-DOCS-FINAL-EVIDENCE-SCOPE-031 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-readiness.md` | `selfTestVmProductionReadinessSignoffLint`. | Red-team docs audit found final signoff evidence detection scanned the whole readiness document, so historical passed `contract`/`vm-production` text could satisfy the startup blocker guard once a final-evidence heading existed. Docs-lint now bounds final gate matching to the `Final Signoff Gate Evidence` section, and the self-test rejects stale historical gate lines outside that section. Passed `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`; selected by `docs-contract` in `contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-DOCS-FINAL-EVIDENCE-CURRENT-SOURCE-032 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-readiness.md` | `selfTestVmProductionReadinessSignoffLint`. | Red-team docs audit found copied historical `contract` / `vm-production` passed lines could still satisfy the final-evidence section. Docs-lint now requires final signoff evidence to include a `Source state: vm-production-current-source:<hash>` token derived from the current source file contents while excluding this readiness document, so copied historical text cannot close the startup blocker for a different source state. Passed `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`; selected by `docs-contract` in `contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-MAPNEW-BARE-RTTID-032 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/tests/integration.rs` | `module_verifier_accepts_map_new_bare_key_rttid_032`, `module_verifier_rejects_map_new_bare_key_rttid_kind_drift_032`, `test_jit_instruction_metadata_for_dynamic_slice_and_map_ops`. | Red-team audit found the 031 `MapNew` verifier read the key RTTID slot as packed `ValueRttid`, while codegen and runtime map hashing/equality use a bare runtime type id. The shared verifier now treats the slot as the runtime-owned bare RTTID, combines it with the already-verified key `ValueMeta` kind only for canonical lookup, and still rejects metadata-kind drift. The codegen dynamic slice/map metadata test now verifies the compiled `make(map[Big]Big)` module through the shared verifier. Focused common-core and codegen proofs passed; selected by common-core and codegen contract gates. |
| VM-DOCS-FINAL-EVIDENCE-MACHINE-033 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `cmd/vo-dev/src/task_runner.rs`, `cmd/vo-dev/src/task_system.rs` | `selfTestVmProductionSourceStateHash`, `selfTestVmProductionReadinessSignoffLint`. | Red-team docs/gate audit found final signoff evidence was still markdown-only and the source-state proof could become self-referential once generated evidence files existed. Docs-lint now ignores readiness-doc and `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-gate-evidence/` changes when hashing the current source state, and closing the startup blocker requires matching `vo-dev-task-run-evidence-v1` JSON files for clean `contract` and `vm-production` runs. `vo-dev task run` writes those evidence files only after the selected clean gate succeeds. Passed `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs` and full `vo-dev` tests; selected by `docs-contract`, `contract`, and `vm-production`. |
| VM-MAPITER-GC-SLOT-LAYOUT-033 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/bytecode.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/objects/map.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/for_range.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/effects.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-jit/src/translate/collections/map.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_map_iter_gc_slot_layout_drift_033`. | Red-team GC audit found map iterator slots had split ownership: runtime/codegen/JIT expected GC-bearing iterator slots, but the shared verifier only accepted a same-width range and could admit all-`Value` slot metadata. Common-core now owns `MAP_ITER_SLOT_TYPES`, runtime re-exports and asserts the same ABI, codegen/JIT consume that fact source, and the verifier rejects exact slot-layout drift before interpreter or JIT execution. Focused common-core proof passed; selected by common-core, codegen, runtime, and JIT contract gates. |
| VM-PR-CHANGED-CODEGEN-CONTRACT-033 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `eng/tasks.toml`, `cmd/vo-dev/src/lint_system.rs` | `lint_codegen_contract_requires_group_in_pr`, `task plan pr --changed --format json`. | Red-team gate audit found changed-mode PR planning could touch codegen/JIT metadata paths without selecting `cargo-test-codegen` because `pr` did not include `codegen-contract`. The task graph now includes `codegen-contract` in both `pr` group facts, strict task lint requires that ownership, and `pr --changed` plans `cargo-test-codegen` for the current VM/codegen diff. Focused vo-dev lint and strict task lint passed; selected by `vo-dev-contract` and the PR gate. |
| VM-PRODUCTION-WORKFLOW-DUAL-GATE-033 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `.github/workflows/production-readiness.yml`, `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs` | `selfTestProductionReadinessWorkflowLint`. | Red-team gate audit found the manual production-readiness workflow ran only `vm-production`, while restored signoff requires both `contract` and `vm-production`. The workflow now uses a selector matrix for both gates and derives metadata, tool bootstrap/check, and task execution from `${{ matrix.selector }}` instead of hard-coding one gate. Docs-lint rejects a vm-production-only workflow shape; selected by `docs-contract` in `contract` and `vm-production`. |
| VM-CONTAINER-LAYOUT-FACTS-034 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `module_verifier_rejects_map_read_layout_drift_from_map_new_034`, `module_verifier_rejects_map_iter_layout_drift_from_map_new_034`, `module_verifier_rejects_queue_recv_layout_drift_from_queue_new_034`. | Red-team VM/GC audit found map and queue element layouts still had split fact ownership: `MapNew`/`QueueNew` could create a GC-bearing container while later MapGet/MapIterNext/QueueRecv metadata described scalar slots, hiding roots or desynchronizing interpreter and JIT contracts. The shared verifier now builds a container-layout dataflow from MapNew, QueueNew, MapIterInit, copies, and typed parameters; known map/queue facts must match every access layout, and `QueueNew` packed elem meta/rttid must match `QueueLayout` before execution. Focused and full common-core proofs passed; selected by common-core contract gates. |
| VM-MAPSET-BARRIER-META-SOURCE-034 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/exec/map.rs` | `exec_map_set_barrier_source_is_map_metadata_034`. | Red-team interpreter/JIT parity audit found interpreter `MapSet` still used instruction flags to decide whether to run write barriers, while JIT and runtime helpers use the map object's stored metadata. The interpreter now derives key/value barrier decisions from `map::key_meta` and `map::val_meta`, eliminating the flags semantic fork. Focused vo-vm source-contract proof passed; selected by VM crate tests. |
| VM-FINAL-GATE-EVIDENCE-EXACT-034 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `cmd/vo-dev/src/task_runner.rs`, `eng/tasks.toml` | `selfTestVmProductionSourceStateHash`, `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `vo-dev lint tasks --strict`. | Red-team gate audit found final signoff machine evidence still accepted a small required-task subset and lived under ignored `target/`, so a restored-signoff checkout could not reproduce the proof. Gate evidence now lives in tracked `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-gate-evidence/`, the source-state hash excludes that directory and the readiness doc, and docs-lint expands `contract` / `vm-production` from `eng/tasks.toml` to require exact task arrays. Docs-lint self-tests reject missing and subset evidence before accepting exact evidence. |
| VM-DOCS-WORKFLOW-CHANGED-034 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `eng/tasks.toml`, `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `.github/workflows/production-readiness.yml` | `task plan pr --changed --format json`, `vo-dev lint tasks --strict`, `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`. | Red-team gate audit found workflow-only changes could avoid docs-lint because `docs-lint` inputs did not include workflow files. | VM-EXEC-SURFACE-OWNERSHIP-045 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/lib.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/exec/mod.rs` | `vm_exec_helpers_are_not_public_api_045`. | Red-team frame-call audit found safe public `vo_vm::exec::*` helpers could be called with unverified modules/fibers and materialize frames or defer payloads outside `Vm::load` / `Vm::spawn_call` contracts. Focused proof passed; vo-vm clippy with `-D warnings` still fails on pre-existing `vo-common-core` clippy debt and is not counted as a passing gate. |
| VM-FINAL-SIGNOFF-EVIDENCE-SCOPE-046 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `lang/docs/dev/vm-production-readiness.md` | `selfTestVmProductionSourceStateHash`, `selfTestVmProductionReadinessSignoffLint`. | Red-team gate audit found restored-signoff evidence could require only `contract` and `vm-production` even though the reentry criteria require final `contract`, `vm-production`, `site`, and `release-verify` runs. Docs-lint now treats those four selectors as the final signoff evidence set, requires matching tracked `vo-dev-task-run-evidence-v1` JSON for each selector, and rejects a final-evidence section that omits `site` or `release-verify`. Passed docs-lint and full `vo-dev` proof tests. |
| VM-VO-WEB-HARDENING-ROUTE-046 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `eng/ci.toml`, `cmd/vo-dev/src/lint_system.rs` | `lint_vm_readiness_changed_prefixes_requires_vo_web_route`, `lint_vm_readiness_changed_prefixes_requires_vo_web_hardening_route`. | Red-team gate audit found `lang/crates/vo-web/**` changed-mode routing selected wasm checks but not `cargo-test-web-hardening`, so a VM adapter proof under `vo-web` could be missed by PR changed-mode. The changed-prefix contract now requires the vo-web route and `cargo-test-web-hardening`, and `eng/ci.toml` selects it for vo-web changes. Focused/full `vo-dev` tests, strict task lint, and PR changed-mode planning passed with `cargo-test-web-hardening` selected. |
| VM-HOST-REPLAY-ADAPTER-PROOF-046 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-web/src/async_runner.rs`, `apps/playground-legacy/rust/src/lib.rs`, `eng/tasks.toml` | `vm_wasm_fetch_replay_source_045_uses_fetch_source_identity`, `handle_event_host_wake_records_only_gui_replay_wait_key_045`, `lint_playground_host_wake_task_filter_*`. | Red-team gate audit found the 045 host replay source fix was correct in source but adapter proofs could miss a regression where `vo-web` fetch used the wrong replay source or legacy Playground recorded any replay key. | VM-STUDIO-WASM-WAKE-CONTRACT-046 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `eng/tasks.toml`, `apps/studio/wasm/src/lib.rs` | `selfTestStudioWasmRuntimeSourceContractLint`, `lint_docs_contract_requires_docs_lint_studio_wasm_source_input`. | Red-team gate audit found Studio wasm wake rejection propagation was correct in source but not mechanically covered by the docs-lint source contract that already guarded the web backend. Docs-lint now reads `apps/studio/wasm/src/lib.rs`, rejects `wakeHostEvent` exports that ignore or remap VM wake rejection outside `session_error_to_js`, and the docs-lint task declares the wasm source as an input. | VM-CLOSURE-CALL-SURFACE-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/helpers.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-web/src/vm.rs` | `spawn_closure_call_rejects_invalid_closure_ref_047`, `spawn_closure_call_rejects_invalid_root_arg_047`, `vm_closure_call_surface_is_vm_owned_047`, `vm_web_closure_calls_use_vm_owned_frame_entry_047`. | Red-team interpreter/API audit found `vo-web` still shaped closure-call arguments through public `vo_vm::vm::helpers::build_closure_args` before calling `Vm::spawn_call`, leaving embedder code coupled to closure frame layout and raw helper internals. `Vm::spawn_closure_call` now owns closure target canonicalization, user-arg shape validation, full argument construction, and final root-bearing arg validation through `spawn_call`; `vo-web` uses that semantic API, and `vm::helpers` is crate-owned. Focused `vo-vm` and `vo-web` proofs passed. |
| VM-EXEC-HELPERS-CLEAN-BUILD-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/lib.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/exec/slice.rs` | `vm_exec_helper_module_is_crate_owned_for_opcode_helpers_047`. | Clean-target validation found `vo-vm` could fail to compile after opcode `exec` helpers became crate-owned: `exec::*` still imports VM stack/runtime helpers, but `vm::helpers` had to remain crate-owned instead of private to the `vm` module or public to embedders. `vm::helpers` is now `pub(crate)`, the source contract rejects public helper exposure and private helper regression, and `SliceAppend` normalizes dynamic element metadata to an explicit `(usize, usize)` pair so clean builds do not depend on ambiguous integer inference. Focused clean-target `vo-vm`, app-runtime, and Studio wasm checks passed. |
| VM-HELPERS-CRATE-OWNERSHIP-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/helpers.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/frame_call.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs` | `vm_closure_call_surface_is_vm_owned_047`, `vm_arch_boundary_fact_sources_001_source_owners_are_documented_in_code`. | Task-gate validation found the closure-call surface fix left `vm::helpers` private to the `vm` module, so crate-owned `exec/*` and `frame_call` modules could not compile in fresh `vo-web` / Playground contract tasks. Follow-up fresh `vo-vm` validation also found closure-call layout ownership was split between an unused helper re-export and direct `frame_call` runtime access. `vm::helpers` is now `pub(crate)` while remaining non-public API, and it owns a crate-private `closure_call_layout` wrapper used by `frame_call`, preserving internal ownership without exposing raw helper internals outside `vo-vm`. The focused proof, source-contract proof, full fresh `vo-vm` test run, and affected task gates passed. |
| VM-STACK-ARRAY-SLOT-FACTS-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/func.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/lvalue.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/for_range.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/tests/integration.rs` | `stack_array_copy_slot_accesses_are_index_checked_047`. | Contract gate validation found OSR language cases generating invalid bytecode because bulk stack-array copy and stack-array `range` value loads emitted `SlotSet`/`SlotGet` without a verifier-visible constant-length `IndexCheck` fact for the same index slot. `FuncBuilder::emit_stack_array_index_check` is now the single codegen owner for stack-array index facts, and bulk load/store, lvalue, nested-index, field, and range paths all use it before dynamic Slot access. Focused proof and representative OSR cases `array_value_semantics.vo` and `big_array.vo` passed. |
| VM-MAPNEW-CANONICAL-METADATA-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/type_interner.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/tests/integration.rs` | `map_new_struct_key_uses_canonical_key_metadata_047`. | Contract gate validation found `map_iteration_order::osr` rejected `MapNew` for a struct-key map because the packed key `ValueMeta` and key `ValueRttid` were produced by separate codegen fact sources and could drift after other metadata was interned. `intern_type_key` now writes back canonical struct/interface metadata after runtime-type interning, and `get_or_create_map_metas` derives key/value metadata, slot counts, and bare key RTTID from canonical transfer metadata, so `MapNew` packs one canonical fact source. Focused proof, full `vo-codegen`, and `map_iteration_order.vo` OSR passed. |
| VM-GC-DIAGNOSTIC-RELEASE-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/gc.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs` | `gc_debug_ref_membership_is_release_available_047`. | Release OSR contract compilation found `Vm::validate_spawn_call_args` used `Gc::debug_ref_membership`, which called `refresh_object_index`, but both GC diagnostic helpers were debug-only. The VM release error path now has the same membership diagnostics as debug builds, and the proof rejects reintroducing `debug_assertions` gating on either method. Focused runtime proof and full runtime GC contract selection passed. |
| VM-TRANSFER-SLOT-COUNT-CONTRACT-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml` | `transfer_metadata_slot_width_047_uses_slot_count_contract`. | The canonical transfer-metadata path could report oversized layouts as `slot width ... exceeds u16`, while the language compile-fail contract and other codegen owners use the shared `type slot count exceeds u16::MAX` contract. The transfer metadata owner now emits the shared slot-count wording, keeping OSR/compile manifest expectations and source diagnostics on one fact source. Focused proof plus the `map_make_key_u16` and `map_make_value_u16` compile-fail cases passed. |
| VM-FINAL-EVIDENCE-WRITER-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `cmd/vo-dev/src/task_runner.rs`, `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs` | `final_signoff_evidence_writes_all_required_selectors_047`, `gate_plan_env_includes_resolved_task_dependencies_035`. | Final red-team gate audit found docs-lint required tracked machine evidence for `contract`, `vm-production`, `site`, and `release-verify`, but `vo-dev task run` wrote evidence only for `contract` and `vm-production`. The evidence writer and injected task-plan environment now share the final selector fact source, so `site` and `release-verify` successful clean runs can produce the same canonical JSON required by docs-lint. The new proof failed first on missing `site.json`, then passed; full `vo-dev` tests and docs-lint passed. |
| VM-GC-TRANSITION-BOUNDARY-DIRTY-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs` | `vm_gc_transition_boundary_dirties_current_fiber_047`. | Final GC red-team audit found the scheduling boundary treated every `ExecResult::Transition` as if it did not need the current-fiber dirty mark. A transition's `GcRootEffect` describes additional boundary payload roots, but it must not erase the fact that the current fiber just ran and may have changed scanned stack/global roots before publishing the transition. `exec_result_marks_gc_fiber_roots_dirty` now excludes only `Interrupted`; transition boundaries with `GcRootEffect::None` still dirty the current fiber before a possible GC step, preserving `StableSinceLastScan` correctness. The proof failed first on the transition dirty assertion, then passed with the focused VM GC filter. |
| VM-JIT-FATAL-PENDING-POLICY-047 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/jit/bridge_result.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs` | `vm_jit_fatal_infra_transport_preserves_jit_error_terminal_policy_047`. | Final JIT red-team audit found full-function JIT converted `JitBridgeTransition::JitError` into `RuntimeTransition::fatal_infra` before pending-transition attach. That made the pending attach path treat fatal JIT infra as an ordinary transition and commit default `CommitOnLanguagePanic` or discard-on-terminal effects, bypassing the stricter `ExecResult::JitError` terminal policy used by OSR. The bridge decoder now preserves JIT errors as `ExecResult::JitError` / `OsrResult::JitError`, so pending terminal policy is owned in one place by `attach_pending_runtime_transitions`. The proof failed first with a pending spawn committed into a fatal transition, then passed with the full bridge-result filter. |
| VM-EXTERN-RETURNSHAPE-MERGE-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19 | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs` | `extern_return_shape_merge_rejects_slot_count_layout_drift_048`, `declared_extern_rejects_same_name_different_precise_return_layout_048`. | Red-team extern ABI audit found same-name extern registration could merge a larger `ReturnShape.slots` with a smaller precise `slot_types` vector, while wrapper registration used exact layout. The extern table owner now validates both shapes, rejects slot-count and precise slot-type drift, and only fills missing layout facts when the slot count is identical. The first proof failed before the fix, and both focused codegen proofs passed afterward. |
| VM-RETURNSHAPE-LOAD-INVARIANT-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19 | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/bytecode.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/serialize.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `deserialize_rejects_extern_return_shape_slot_type_drift_048`, `module_verifier_rejects_extern_return_shape_slot_type_drift_048`. | Red-team bytecode audit found serialized `ReturnShape` values could be loaded with `slot_types.len() != slots`, leaving validation mostly to resolved extern tables. `ReturnShape::try_new` and `validate_with_label` now own the invariant for decoded and module verifier paths, including interface pair ordering. Focused `vo-common-core return_shape` proofs passed. |
| VM-DYNAMIC-MAP-UNHASHABLE-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19 | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/builtins/dynamic.rs`, `tests/lang/cases/dyn/dyn_map_any_unhashable_key.vo`, `tests/lang/manifest.toml` | `dynamic_map_paths_use_checked_map_errors_and_pre_set_barriers_048`, `dyn.dyn-map-any-unhashable-key`. | Red-team dynamic runtime audit found dynamic map index get/set still used unchecked map wrappers that could collapse `UnhashableInterfaceKey` into missing/no-op behavior, and the dynamic set write-barrier order diverged from VM/JIT map writes. Dynamic map index and string-key paths now use checked map APIs and perform key/value barriers before mutation; the language case is tagged `contract` and is selected by `vo-dev test plan --suite lang --targets vm --tags contract --path tests/lang/cases/dyn/dyn_map_any_unhashable_key.vo`. The Rust source-contract proof passed, but local `vo-dev test run --targets vm --path ... --verbose` hung in the runner for both this case and an existing dyn case, so the language execution gate is not counted as passed from this source state. |
| VM-RUNTIME-TRANSITION-INGRESS-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19 | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_shared.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_thread.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs` | `vm_runtime_transition_ingress_errors_are_not_silently_discarded_048`. | Red-team runtime-boundary audit found island spawn and endpoint request/close ingress paths could discard `apply_runtime_transition` failures after queue or endpoint side effects were prepared. The island ingress helpers now return `Result` and their callers either propagate `VmError` or exit the island loop with an explicit error path; the source-contract proof rejects `let _ = vm.apply_runtime_transition` in these ingress owners and passed. |
| VM-JIT-ENV-TEST-ISOLATION-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-engine/src/run.rs` | `vm_jit_threshold_env_tests_use_process_env_lock_048`. | Red-team test-gate audit found a JIT source-index regression test mutated process-global `VO_JIT_CALL_THRESHOLD` and `VO_JIT_LOOP_THRESHOLD` without serializing or restoring env state, so parallel Rust tests could observe foreign thresholds. The test now uses a shared process-env lock and RAII env restoration. Focused `vo-engine --features jit` proof passed. |
| VM-STUDIO-WASM-WAKE-TYPE-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `apps/studio/src/lib/studio_wasm.ts`, `apps/studio/wasm/src/lib.rs`, `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`, `eng/tasks.toml`, `cmd/vo-dev/src/lint_system.rs` | `selfTestStudioWasmTypeContracts`, `lint_docs_contract_requires_docs_lint_studio_wasm_types_input`, `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`. | Red-team Studio/wasm audit found the `VoVmInstance.wakeHostEvent` TypeScript interface did not match the actual Studio wasm wrapper. The wrapper returns `Result<(), JsValue>`, so successful JS calls return `undefined` and rejected wakes throw through `session_error_to_js`; the TypeScript contract now uses the matching throwing `void` surface, and docs-lint rejects a stale boolean declaration on the Studio wrapper while still checking that Rust wake rejection is surfaced. | VM-BYTECODE-SPEC-ABI-048 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/docs/spec/vm-bytecode.md`, `apps/playground-legacy/src/assets/docs/generated/spec/vm-bytecode.md`, `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs` | `selfTestVmBytecodeSpecAbi`, `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`. | Red-team docs audit found the VM bytecode spec still documented stale `ExternDef.param_slots` / `ret_slots`, stale `PtrNew flags=slots`, and old `Call`/`CallClosure` execution ABI prose while source uses `ParamShape`/`ReturnShape`, `PtrNew c=slots, flags=reserved`, and packed call shapes. The source spec now documents the current ABI shape and related opcode/metadata facts, generated Playground docs were regenerated through `scripts/ci/docs_sync.mjs`, and docs-lint rejects these stale ABI fields. Docs-lint passed after regeneration. |
| VM-RETURNSHAPE-CONSTRUCTOR-049 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/bytecode.rs` | `return_shape_constructor_rejects_invalid_interface_slot_pairs_048`. | Follow-up ABI red-team audit found `ReturnShape::try_with_slot_types` could still construct orphan `Interface0`/`Interface1` layouts even though deserialize and module verification rejected them. The constructor now delegates to `ReturnShape::try_new`, making the structure invariant one fact source. Focused `vo-common-core 048` proof passed. |
| VM-EXTERN-PARAM-ABI-049 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/bytecode.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-common-core/src/verifier.rs` | `declared_extern_rejects_same_name_different_parameter_kinds_048`, `declared_extern_rejects_same_name_different_exact_parameter_slots_048`, `module_verifier_rejects_call_extern_param_kind_layout_drift_048`. | Follow-up extern ABI audit found same-name extern merging rejected return-shape drift but still allowed parameter slot/kind drift, and hand-written bytecode could mismatch `param_kinds` with `CallExternLayout.arg_layout`. Codegen now merges parameter ABI through one helper that only upgrades unknown facts and rejects exact/kind drift, while the shared verifier checks `ExtSlotKind` against each call's argument slot layout. Focused codegen and common-core proofs passed. |
| VM-RUNTIME-MAP-CHECKED-049 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/builtins/dynamic.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/ffi/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/ffi/containers.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/pack.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/gc.rs` | `runtime_map_surfaces_use_checked_map_api_and_pre_set_barriers_048`, `dynamic_map_paths_use_checked_map_errors_and_pre_set_barriers_048`. | Follow-up dynamic/runtime audit found FFI and helper surfaces still used lossy map wrappers and post-mutation barriers, and the dynamic string-key path was not locked by the first 048 source contract. Production runtime surfaces now use checked map APIs, treat unexpected map-key errors as explicit contract failures, and perform root barriers before map insertion. Focused `vo-runtime 048` proofs passed. |
| VM-DEFER-GO-EXTERN-ABI-050 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/expr/call.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/stmt/defer_go.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/wrapper.rs` | `defer_extern_wrapper_preserves_call_extern_param_abi_050`, `extern_defer_go_wrappers_use_callsite_arg_layout_050`. | 050 extern ABI red-team audit found defer/go package extern wrappers still synthesized an interface-boxed ABI for the original extern name, so direct calls and scheduled wrappers could disagree on `ExternDef.params` / `param_kinds` / `CallExternLayout.arg_layout`; wrapper-only WASM paths could also send empty extern inputs. Codegen now derives `ExtSlotKind` from the actual call-site slot layout through one helper, and defer/go wrappers expose, schedule, register, and emit `CallExtern` with that same layout instead of a second boxed ABI. Focused `vo-codegen 050` proofs passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-codegen`. |
| VM-PACK-MAP-KEY-CONTEXT-050 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/pack.rs` | `unpack_struct_key_map_uses_checked_key_context_050`. | 050 runtime map red-team audit found packed map unpacking had moved to checked insertion but still passed no module context, so struct/interface-key maps could panic or fail to preserve deep key hash/equality semantics. `PackTypeContext` now builds the temporary module fact source needed by checked map insertion for struct/interface keys, keeping pack/unpack key hashing on the same metadata used by ordinary runtime maps. Focused `vo-runtime` proof passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-runtime`. |
| VM-RUNTIME-MAP-CHECKED-API-050 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/objects/map.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/ffi/mod.rs` | `runtime_map_surfaces_use_checked_map_api_and_pre_set_barriers_048`. | 050 runtime API red-team audit found the production call sites used checked map APIs, but public lossy `objects::map::{get,set,delete,contains}` wrappers still formed a bypass that could collapse `UnhashableInterfaceKey` into missing/no-op behavior. The lossy wrappers are removed, leaving checked map APIs as the runtime fact source; the source-contract proof now rejects reintroducing those public wrappers and passed. `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-runtime`. |
| VM-ISLAND-RUN-SCHEDULED-ERROR-050 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_thread.rs` | `island_thread_run_scheduled_errors_exit_loop_050`. | 050 runtime-boundary red-team audit found the OS-thread island loop still discarded `vm.run_scheduled()` errors, so scheduler execution failures could be hidden after command handling. The loop now reports the scheduler error and exits, matching the explicit error paths used by other island ingress failures. Focused `vo-vm` proof passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-vm`. |
| VM-MEMORY-MODEL-PTRNEW-ABI-050 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/docs/spec/memory-model-and-instructions.md`, `apps/playground-legacy/src/assets/docs/generated/spec/memory-model-and-instructions.md`, `scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs` | `selfTestMemoryModelInstructionAbi`, `node scripts/ci/docs_lint.mjs`. | 050 docs red-team audit found `memory-model-and-instructions.md` still documented stale `PtrNew a,b,flags` / `flags=slots` even after the bytecode spec had been repaired. The source spec and generated Playground mirror now document `PtrNew a,b,c,flags` with `c=slots, flags=reserved`, and docs-lint rejects the stale wording. Docs-lint passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `docs-lint`. |
| VM-ZERO-ARG-EXTERN-PARAM-ABI-051 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-codegen/src/context.rs` | `declared_zero_arg_extern_preserves_exact_param_shape_051`. | 051 extern ABI red-team audit found declared zero-argument externs lost the exact zero-arity fact because `param_shape_from_kinds([])` meant `CallSiteVariadic`. Declared extern registration now uses an exact param-shape helper, so zero-arg externs remain `ParamShape::Exact { slots: 0 }` while intentionally variadic builtin helpers keep their separate fact source. The proof failed first on `CallSiteVariadic`, then passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-codegen`. |
| VM-WASM-EXT-BRIDGE-PROVIDER-051 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-web/runtime-wasm/src/ext_bridge.rs` | `wasm_extension_prefix_does_not_replace_existing_provider_051`, `wasm_extension_prefix_requires_name_boundary_051`. | 051 extern provider audit found loaded WASM extension aliases used unbounded `starts_with` matching and could replace existing stdlib/web providers such as `time_nowUnixNano`. Bridge registration now skips already registered providers and requires an exact name or `_` boundary after the loaded module key. Both proofs failed first and then passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-web-runtime-wasm`. |
| VM-WASM-EXT-OUTPUT-CONTRACT-051 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-web/runtime-wasm/src/ext_bridge.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-runtime/src/ffi/mod.rs` | `wasm_extension_output_decoder_is_total_source_contract_051`. | 051 WASM bridge audit found malformed or truncated extension output could break out of decoding and return `ExternResult::Ok`, leaving missing return slots invisible. The bridge now parses the whole output stream before writing return slots, requires the decoded slot count to match the extern return window, and records malformed data through the shared `ExternCallContext` contract-error channel. The proof failed first on the lossy decoder and then passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-web-runtime-wasm`. |
| VM-RUNTIME-QUEUE-WAKE-REJECTION-051 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/runtime_boundary.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/types.rs` | `vm_runtime_transition_queue_wake_rejection_051`. | 051 runtime-boundary audit found queue wake helpers returned rejection for stale or mismatched wait state, but `apply_runtime_wake` converted local waiter/closed-receiver/closed-sender rejection into success. The runtime transition applier now treats rejected queue wakes as `VmError::Jit`, preserving the boundary contract that committed queue effects must either wake a valid target or fail. The proof failed first on accepted stale wakes and then passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-vm`. |
| VM-QUEUECLOSE-TRANSITION-OWNERSHIP-051 | Closed, 2026-06-19; production signoff still pending final gates | `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/mod.rs`, `lang/crates/vo-vm/src/vm/island_shared.rs` | `vm_interpreter_queue_close_endpoint_effects_share_transition_051`. | 051 scheduler audit found interpreter `QueueClose` applied endpoint close/tombstone effects through a separate helper before returning the close transition, while JIT appended those effects to the same pending transition. Interpreter `QueueClose` now calls `append_closed_home_endpoint_effects` on its close transition and the old `finalize_closed_home_endpoint` bypass was removed. The proof failed first on the separate helper and then passed; `contract` and `vm-production` plans select `cargo-test-vm`. |
